Client Startup Kit (First Three Sessions)

Session 1: Coaching Questions Worksheet

Use this worksheet to capture key information about your clients during your first sessions. If you like, during the sessions, write down key words, phrases, questions, or observations on scratch paper, then transfer them to this sheet. Don't worry - there may be some blanks. You can fill them as you get to know the client. Often your first session will reveal things that you may find useful later, so go over this worksheet to review what you know about your client's life. 


Client information:

Date:

Client Name:  

Client Phone:

Client Address:

Client Email:

Client contacted through phone or email:


First session Notes:

Notes on personal relationships (marriage, children) previous marriages:





Notes on workplace:





Greatest Challenge:





Greatest Joy:





Frequently experienced states:





Frequently used words or phrases:





Most Important Spheres of Life:





Beliefs:





Is this person more outcome oriented or process oriented?
 




Top priorities and goals:
